overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character in a long coat and hat walking along a dirt trail through rocky forest terrain. The scene features overcast lighting and dense pine forests, with a brief encounter with a horse rider who gallops past on the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail between large boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the winding dirt path through rocky forest terrain

entered.detail: massive gray rock formation lining the left side of the trail
large boulder formation on the right side of the path
tall evergreen pine trees surrounding the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the rocky forest

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail flanked by large rock outcrops and boulders. Tall pine trees line the path under an overcast sky, creating an enclosed rocky corridor with dense vegetation.

events.description: a rider on a brown horse gallops past from behind and overtakes the character on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest trail as a horse rider passes by from behind

notable_agents.action: rider on brown horse galloping past the character on the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through denser pine forest as a horse rider gallops past from behind. The large rock formations on the left recede out of view while the right rock formation fades into the distance, and the path winds through increasingly wooded terrain with tall evergreens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a narrow dirt trail that transitions from a rocky corridor into a dense pine forest. It begins with the character walking between large rock outcrops and boulders under an overcast sky, where tall pine trees create an enclosed feeling. As the path winds forward, the large rock formations on the left recede from view and those on the right fade into the distance. The scene then shifts into increasingly wooded terrain as a horse rider gallops past from behind, moving the camera deeper into a thicket of towering evergreens.
